headlines.title: SpaceX Continues Starship Development Progress
headlines.description: SpaceX makes progress on Starship development.

headlines.title: Starlink IPO Expected Before SpaceX Goes Public
headlines.description: Elon Musk reiterates Starlink will IPO first in 2026.

key_angle: Starlink IPO expected in 2026, followed by SpaceX IPO in Q4 2026
